sentence_reviews.text: A Gaussian process places a probability distribution over functions and uses a kernel to couple observations, interpolate predictions, and quantify posterior uncertainty.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML Gaussian process and Bayesian nonparametric / kernel topics; Deep Learning kernel-method background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Distribution over functions, kernels, prediction, and posterior uncertainty are directly characteristic of GPs.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Gaussian processes is to connect Kernels & implicit feature maps, Bayesian & approximate inference to downstream capabilities including Time-series forecasting, anomaly & fraud detection, Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins, Weather, climate & geospatial forecasting.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML Gaussian process, Bayesian inference, kernel, and time-series/regression topics; Deep Learning kernel-method background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Kernel and Bayesian-inference dependencies are supported; the full downstream application list is not directly established by the packet citations.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Time-series forecasting, anomaly & fraud detection
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML Gaussian process regression and time-series / probabilistic prediction topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: GP regression is commonly used for time-indexed prediction and uncertainty; anomaly/fraud is broader than direct evidence.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML Gaussian process regression and Bayesian modeling topics; no direct scientific-ML/digital-twin passage in packet evidence.
sentence_reviews.notes: GP surrogate modeling is plausible for scientific ML, but the named downstream category is not directly evidenced.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Weather, climate & geospatial forecasting
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML GP/time-series/regression topics; no direct weather, climate, or geospatial evidence in packet sources.
sentence_reviews.notes: GPs are plausible for spatiotemporal/geostatistical modeling, but packet evidence is too general for the exact downstream claim.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Kernels & implicit feature maps, Bayesian & approximate inference.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML GP/kernel/Bayesian inference topics and model-selection context; Deep Learning kernel-method context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Dependencies are supported; the limitation wording is generic and not directly evidenced.

sentence_reviews.text: Gaussian processes is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Kernels & implicit feature maps.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML Gaussian process covariance kernels; Deep Learning kernel-method background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Kernels/covariance functions are central to GPs.

sentence_reviews.text: Gaussian processes is learned, selected, or evaluated using the objective family Bayesian & approximate inference.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML Gaussian processes as Bayesian nonparametric/probabilistic models and approximate inference topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Exact GP inference is Bayesian; approximate inference is common for scaling/non-Gaussian likelihoods.

sentence_reviews.text: Gaussian processes consumes, emits, or organizes information using Distributions, uncertainty & beliefs.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML Gaussian process posterior predictive distributions and Bayesian uncertainty topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Uncertainty distributions are central to GP prediction.

edge_reviews.notes: GP covariance functions are kernels; composes/core is supported.
GPs are Bayesian function-space models; inference is central, with approximations common in practice.
GPs represent distributions over functions and posterior uncertainty; represents_with/common is supported, though core could also be justified.
